'''zofachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ointmentlike|ointmentlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ointmentlike|ointmentlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zofachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zofachithi|zofachithi]] || [[word:zofachiji|zofachiji]] || [[word:zofachishi|zofachishi]] || [[word:zofachiki|zofachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zofachuthuthu|zofachuthuthu]] || [[word:zofachujuju|zofachujuju]] || [[word:zofachushushu|zofachushushu]] || [[word:zofachukuku|zofachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zofachuthu|zofachuthu]] || [[word:zofachuju|zofachuju]] || [[word:zofachushu|zofachushu]] || [[word:zofachuku|zofachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zofachufthuf|zofachufthuf]] || [[word:zofachufjuf|zofachufjuf]] || [[word:zofachufshuf|zofachufshuf]] || [[word:zofachufkuf|zofachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zofachethe|zofachethe]] || [[word:zofacheje|zofacheje]] || [[word:zofacheshe|zofacheshe]] || [[word:zofacheke|zofacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zofachothotho|zofachothotho]] || [[word:zofachojojo|zofachojojo]] || [[word:zofachoshosho|zofachoshosho]] || [[word:zofachokoko|zofachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zofachotho|zofachotho]] || [[word:zofachojo|zofachojo]] || [[word:zofachosho|zofachosho]] || [[word:zofachoko|zofachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zofachofthof|zofachofthof]] || [[word:zofachofjof|zofachofjof]] || [[word:zofachofshof|zofachofshof]] || [[word:zofachofkof|zofachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zofachïfthïf|zofachïfthïf]] || [[word:zofachïfjïf|zofachïfjïf]] || [[word:zofachïfshïf|zofachïfshïf]] || [[word:zofachïfkïf|zofachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zofachïfthïfthïf|zofachïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zofachïfjïfjïf|zofachïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zofachïfshïfshïf|zofachïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zofachïfkïfkïf|zofachïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zofachïfthïf|zofachïfthïf]] || [[word:zofachïfjïf|zofachïfjïf]] || [[word:zofachïfshïf|zofachïfshïf]] || [[word:zofachïfkïf|zofachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zofachïfthïf|zofachïfthïf]] || [[word:zofachïfjïf|zofachïfjïf]] || [[word:zofachïfshïf|zofachïfshïf]] || [[word:zofachïfkïf|zofachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zofachæthæ|zofachæthæ]] || [[word:zofachæjæ|zofachæjæ]] || [[word:zofachæshæ|zofachæshæ]] || [[word:zofachækæ|zofachækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zofachathatha|zofachathatha]] || [[word:zofachajaja|zofachajaja]] || [[word:zofachashasha|zofachashasha]] || [[word:zofachakaka|zofachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zofachatha|zofachatha]] || [[word:zofachaja|zofachaja]] || [[word:zofachasha|zofachasha]] || [[word:zofachaka|zofachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zofachafthaf|zofachafthaf]] || [[word:zofachafjaf|zofachafjaf]] || [[word:zofachafshaf|zofachafshaf]] || [[word:zofachafkaf|zofachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zofachasha|zofachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zofachshësha|zofachshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zofachrosha|zofachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zofachmusha|zofachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zofachyasha|zofachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozofachnkshësha|gozofachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozofachnkrosha|gozofachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozofachnkmusha|gozofachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozofachnkyasha|gozofachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zofafachasha|zofafachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zofafachshësha|zofafachshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zofafachrosha|zofafachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zofafachmusha|zofafachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zofafachyasha|zofafachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozofafachnkshësha|gozofafachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozofafachnkrosha|gozofafachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozofafachnkmusha|gozofafachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozofafachnkyasha|gozofafachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zefæchasha|zefæchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zefæchshësha|zefæchshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zefæchrosha|zefæchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zefæchmusha|zefæchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zefæchyasha|zefæchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozefæchnkshësha|gozefæchnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozefæchnkrosha|gozefæchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozefæchnkmusha|gozefæchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozefæchnkyasha|gozefæchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zofachasha|zofachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zofachshësha|zofachshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zofachrosha|zofachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zofachmusha|zofachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zofachyasha|zofachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozofachnkshësha|gozofachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozofachnkrosha|gozofachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozofachnkmusha|gozofachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozofachnkyasha|gozofachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
